candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to the direct total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line and wrong section.

variables.notes: Direct reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line matching cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: cash equivalents on the date of acquisition
candidates.why: Acquisition-related cash flow detail, not period-end cash on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of the subsidiary less cash and cash equivalents on the date of acquisition
candidates.why: Acquisition cash flow detail, not balance-sheet cash.

variables.notes: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Balancing line and wrong section.

variables.notes: Direct reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best match for short-term interest-bearing debt/current borrowings; lease rows are listed separately and can be excluded.
Represents current portion of long-term debt, but may be a component of total short-term debt rather than the clean total.
Short-term financing debt, but may already be included in the broader short-term interest-bearing debt total.

variables.notes: Selected the cleanest current debt total and excluded explicit lease rows. Manual review because the same exact row label appears twice in the sheet preview, creating ambiguity about whether the extracted row is unique and whether any short-term debt components are separately reported.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Tax asset/receivable, opposite of taxes payable.
Deferred taxes are not current taxes payable for accruals purposes.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; confident because it is the direct current tax liability label.

candidates.why: Best reported total for property, plant and equipment/tangible fixed assets; preferable to gross or component rows.
Gross PPE only, inferior to a total net tangible assets line for PPEGT.
Only a component of PPE, not total.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment, Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset line, not PPE total.

variables.notes: Used the reported total tangible assets line as the best proxy for net PPE.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.
Direct operating cash flow subtotal; best match for net cash from operating activities.
Only a component of operating cash flow, not the full operating cash flow total.
Component within operating cash flow, not total.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; confident because it is the direct operating cash flow total.
